title: New-Lead capture modal: add required Country, make Board a dropdown, add Expected student count
business_reason: The generated new-lead modal under-collects vs lead_field_policy.json (the answered-questionnaire source of truth): it omits the MVP-required `country` and uses a free-text `board`, hurting data quality and the lead->school conversion.

gaps_vs_policy: MISSING required-MVP field `country` (lead_field_policy.required_fields_mvp). canonical school_leads.country is NOT NULL default 'India' -> silently defaulted, never collected.
`board` is free text; schools.board already has canonical enum [CBSE, ICSE, State Board, Cambridge, IB, Other] -> lead board should match for clean conversion.

requested_change.country: dropdown, default 'India' (collected explicitly, not silently DB-defaulted)
requested_change.board: dropdown reusing the canonical schools.board enum: [CBSE, ICSE, State Board, Cambridge, IB, Other] (no new enum invented)
requested_change.layout: required fields grouped first, then recommended/optional

checklist_findings.upstream_source_of_truth: lead_field_policy.json: country is required_fields_mvp; board + expected_student_count are recommended_fields
checklist_findings.data_model: canonical school_leads: country nullable=false default=India; board nullable=true (no enum); lead_owner_id required but SYSTEM-assigned per lead_assignment_policy (not user input); lead_code/stage/lead_status/duplicate_status server-defaulted
checklist_findings.reuse_existing_schema: school_leads.board adopts the schools.board enum (consistency, no migration churn risk; board is nullable so adding allowed_values is non-breaking)
checklist_findings.downstream_impact: convert_lead copies city/state/coordinator_name/email into school_onboarding_cases; board carries lead->school on conversion (schema.json conversion mapping)
checklist_findings.what_built_vs_asked: Built: generic 8-field ModuleTable modal (auto createFields). Asked: policy-complete capture with country + board dropdown + expected_student_count.
